decks.notes: The deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and card advantage. By using cards like Jeskai Revelation, Stock Up, and Tablet of Discovery, the player can draw cards and generate resources to outlast their opponent. The deck also includes a mix of removal spells like Sear, Day of Judgment, and Lightning Helix to deal with threats on the board. With the ability to control the game and outvalue the opponent, this deck aims to establish dominance and win through attrition.

The focus of this Azorius Aggro deck is to quickly build a board presence and overwhelm your opponent with a mix of evasion and disruptive spells. Utilizing cards like Momo, Friendly Flier and Sage of the Skies to deal damage in the air, combined with tempo plays like Erode and Seam Rip to disrupt your opponent's strategy. The inclusion of versatile cards like Multiversal Passage and Springleaf Drum allows for flexibility in mana usage and resource generation. Overall, the goal is to maintain pressure early on and create favorable board states to secure a victory.

This deck focuses on fast and aggressive plays, utilizing cheap spells and creatures to apply pressure to the opponent early on. By combining efficient removal spells with powerful creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Riverpyre Verge, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent and secure victory before they can set up their own strategy. With a mix of direct damage, bounce effects, and card draw, the deck can adapt to different board states and maintain its momentum throughout the game. It aims to control the tempo of the game and finish off the opponent swiftly.

The deck focuses on utilizing powerful reanimation spells and combo pieces to quickly bring back strong creatures like Oildeep Gearhulk and Superior Spider-Man. It also includes disruptive cards like Shoot the Sheriff and Strategic Betrayal to control the board and protect the combo. The deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive plays and efficient reanimation, making it a fast and deadly deck to face in a Standard 1 vs 1 match.

The deck focuses on utilizing a combination of card draw, removal, and counterspells to control the game. It utilizes a mix of instant and sorcery spells to disrupt the opponent's strategy while building card advantage. The deck also includes synergy with "Firebending" themed cards to deal damage and maintain board control. The mana base is designed to support the deck's color requirements and ensure smooth gameplay. Overall, the deck aims to outsmart and outlast the opponent through careful resource management and strategic decision-making.

The deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and spells. Utilizing cheap spells like Burst Lightning and Flow State to control the board and maintain tempo, while also using creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and Eddymurk Crab to apply pressure. The dual lands and card draw spells help to ensure consistent mana and card advantage. The goal is to efficiently chip away at the opponent's life total and maintain board control to secure a victory.

This deck focuses on building a fast and aggressive board presence through the use of low-cost creatures like Marauding Mako and Iron-Shield Elf. Practiced Offense and Cool but Rude provide additional damage and pump up the team, while cards like Burst Lightning and Erode help control the board. The inclusion of Joshua, Phoenix's Dominant and Cecil, Dark Knight offer additional threats and resilience. Tersa Lightshatter and Symbiote Spider-Man offer utility and disruption, making it a well-rounded aggressive deck that can quickly overwhelm opponents.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly build up a strong board presence and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and powerful buffs. By utilizing cards like Mightform Harmonizer, Esper Origins, and Earthbender Ascension, the deck can quickly pump up its creatures and deal significant damage. Cards like Meltstrider's Resolve and Escape Tunnel provide additional utility and protection for the creatures. Additionally, the deck includes mana acceleration with Llanowar Elves and Sazh's Chocobo to help get ahead in the early game. With a focus on speed and aggression, this deck aims to win the game quickly before the opponent can respond effectively.

The primary focus of this deck is to aggressively play creatures and spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent. It utilizes a mix of versatile creatures with abilities like haste and evasion, along with direct damage spells to maintain pressure on the opponent. The mana base is designed to support a consistent curve of plays, allowing for a fast and efficient offense. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a steady stream of threats while keeping up the pressure with burn spells when necessary.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize a combination of cards to quickly bring powerful creatures back from the graveyard, creating a strong army on the battlefield. It focuses on using cards like Requiting Hex and Restless Reef to reanimate creatures like Superior Spider-Man and Emeritus of Ideation. It also includes control elements like Duress and Deadly Cover-Up to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of strong creatures and disruptive spells, ultimately leading to victory through a strategic combination of reanimation and control tactics.

This deck focuses on utilizing low-cost spells and creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive tempo plays. It aims to maintain control of the board while dealing direct damage to the opponent through efficient spells and evasive creatures. By combining card advantage and disruptive effects, the deck can maintain a consistent threat presence and pressure the opponent into making suboptimal plays. The inclusion of bounce cards and burn spells adds versatility and ways to interact with the opponent's board, providing multiple angles of attack to secure victory.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast and aggressive creatures while ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage. Cards like Sazh's Chocobo and Badgermole Cub provide early aggression, while Esper Origins and Mightform Harmonizer buff and protect your creatures. Earthbender Ascension and Ba Sing Se offer additional support and control options. The deck aims to quickly build a strong board presence and apply pressure on the opponent, ultimately overwhelming them with a combination of creatures and powerful spells.

This deck focuses on aggressive gameplay with a mix of Blue and Red cards to quickly apply pressure on the opponent. By utilizing cards like Burst Lightning, Slickshot Show-Off, and Stormchaser's Talent, the deck aims to deal damage swiftly and efficiently. The inclusion of card draw spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand helps maintain card advantage and consistency in drawing threats. Additionally, cards like Elusive Otter and Drake Hatcher provide evasive threats to sneak in damage. The deck also includes support cards like Spell Pierce and Boomerang Basics for disruption and protection.

This Mono Green Aggro deck focuses on quickly building a strong board presence and overwhelming the opponent with efficient creatures and powerful spells. The deck utilizes cards like Escape Tunnel, Earthbender Ascension, and Esper Origins to accelerate mana production and play multiple threats early on. Sazh's Chocobo and Badgermole Cub provide additional aggression, while Mightform Harmonizer and Meltstrider's Resolve help to maintain tempo and pressure. With a mix of ramp, combat tricks, and creature synergy, this deck aims to win the game through fast and relentless attacks.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, while using aggressive creatures like Ba Sing Se and Badgermole Cub to apply early pressure on the opponent. With a focus on speeding up the game and overwhelming the opponent with large creatures like Earthbender Ascension and Sazh's Chocobo, the deck aims to win before the opponent can establish a solid defense. Escape Tunnel and Meltstrider's Resolve provide evasion, while Mightform Harmonizer offers a way to buff up creatures for a final push.

The deck focuses on quickly and aggressively dealing damage to the opponent using cheap and efficient spells and creatures. It utilizes cards like Burst Lightning, Flow State, Slickshot Show-Off, and Stormchaser's Talent to keep the pressure on the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Great Hall of the Biblioplex and Riverpyre Verge for mana fixing and card advantage. By combining evasion creatures like Elusive Otter with direct damage spells, the UR Aggro deck aims to close out the game swiftly before the opponent can set up their own game plan.
